kernel.in_place_notes: Backward writes dx into dy buffer when True. Saves alloc + HBM. Closure factory defaults to True for Qwen/Llama (offset=0) and False for Gemma (offset=1, residual-paired pattern).

in_place_equivalence.note: Strict bit-identical between in_place=True and in_place=False.

gradcheck_fp64.note: in_place=True is non-reentrant by design (each backward modifies dy in-place); correctness is verified via test_in_place_equivalence instead.
